Casino Investment — $75M Project

New business, likely needs experience and clients. Map out: who do you know that has a business, who could benefit from an AI audit, who might invest or partner?

🔒

TailScale Setup — Connect Everything to Your Home Device

Set up TailScale on this server and your home device to create a secure VPN. Access all services from anywhere, keep everything on a private network, no exposed ports.

# 1. Install TailScale on server:

curl -fsSL https://tailscale.com/install.sh | sh

# 2. Authenticate (gets your auth key from login.tailscale.com):

sudo tailscale up --authkey <YOUR_AUTH_KEY>

# 3. On your home device, install TailScale and log in

# 4. Both devices will appear in your TailScale admin console

# 5. Access this dashboard via your TailScale IP (e.g. 100.x.x.x)

Get TailScale Auth Key →TailScale admin: login.tailscale.com
